Specification

Length (in.):29.90

Product Features

  • High-Quality Foam: This stripper pole mat is made from soft high-quality cushioning made to provide extra protection with strong cross-linking inside the structural makeup of the foam that ensures it maintains its shape against impactful falls, stiletto heels, and long-term use.
  • Foldable: This pole mat folds up into a quarter of its size, easy carrying, transport, and storage. The lightweight and collapsible structure makes the pole dance mat easy to bring to pole dancing class, while letting you save space in your trunk.
  • Heavy-Duty Cover: Our pole mats for floor are durable against everyday use while offering waterproofness against spills and allowing you to zipper it on and off for easy clean-up.
  • Universal Hole: This pole dance mat can fits most standard pole bases for beginners. Multi-purpose as a round yoga mat that can be used for floor exercises and stretching.
  • Overall Dimensions: 59" Dia. x 2". Folding Dimensions: 29.5" L x 29.5" W x 8" H.
